dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S3693 IS: Large-Scale Water Recycling Reauthorization Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Ms. Cortez Masto (for herself and Mr. Curtis) introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Energy and Natural Resources

form.official-title: To extend the authorization for a large-scale water recycling and reuse grant program.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Large-Scale Water Recycling Reauthorization Act.

section.header: Reauthorization of competitive grant program for large-scale water recycling and reuse program
section.text: Section 40905(k) of the Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act (43 U.S.C. 3205(k)) is amended by striking 5 years and inserting 10 years.
